rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid within annex agree blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible symbols in scope.
Use boolean expressions for range checks when data types are compatible.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions are typically placed in component type scopes for port-based constraints.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type contracts.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing attributes
